name: 时空扭曲-自身加AP
description: 在己方回合开始时增加1点行动点
code: function executeSkill(context) { var battle = context.battle; var currentPlayerId = battle.turn.currentPlayerId; var contextPlayerId = context.playerId; if (!contextPlayerId) return { success: false }; if (currentPlayerId !== contextPlayerId) return { success: false }; var player = battle.players.find(function(p) { return p.playerId === contextPlayerId; }); if (!player) return { success: false }; if (!player.statusTags) player.statusTags = []; var selfEffect = player.statusTags.find(function(t) { return t.type === 'temporal-distortion-self'; }); if (!selfEffect) return { success: false }; player.actionPoints += 1; player.statusTags = player.statusTags.filter(function(t) { return t.type !== 'temporal-distortion-self'; }); removePlayerRuleById(contextPlayerId, 'rule-rafaam-temporal-distortion-self'); return { success: true, message: '时空扭曲使自身行动点+1' }; }
